summary: Both view registrations (stat_io, stat_io_time) and the two Configure() cases exactly match the tech-spec Data Models and Decisions. All field values, version gating, selector wiring, and the track_io_timing Msg hint are correct and consistent with the replslots/bgwriter idiom. Build is clean and the view test suite (including new guard tests and recalculated counts) is green. No tech-debt introduced.

findings.description: stat_io and stat_io_time map entries match Data Models exactly: stat_io has Ncols 16, DiffIntvl [4,14], OrderKey 4, OrderDesc true, UniqueKey 0, MinRequiredVersion query.PostgresV16, NotRecordable true; stat_io_time has Ncols 10, DiffIntvl [4,8], same key/order/version/recordable fields. ColsWidth and Filters initialized as empty maps per the existing idiom.

Configure() cases call query.SelectStatIOQuery(opts.Version) and query.SelectStatIOTimeQuery(opts.Version), assigning view.QueryTmpl, view.Ncols, view.DiffIntvl then v[k]=view. Verified against internal/query/io.go: both selectors have the (string, int, [2]int) signature, identical to SelectStatReplicationSlotsQuery, and the PG16-default constants (PgStatIOPG16, PgStatIOTime) referenced in the map exist and are Format-safe plain SELECTs. query.PostgresV16 exists in query.go (=160000).

Decision 9 (track_io_timing hint) is satisfied: the time view Msg is 'Show pg_stat_io timings statistics (require track_io_timing=on)', carrying the track_io_timing caveat for the cmdline. Guard test asserts Msg contains 'track_io_timing'.
findings.suggestion: Minor wording nit (non-blocking): 'require' would read better as 'requires', but this is cosmetic and the substring assertion is unaffected.

findings.description: Counts recalculated correctly. TestNew updated 24->26. TestView_VersionOK adds {160000, 26} while keeping {140000, 24} unchanged. Verified the highest pre-existing MinRequiredVersion gate is PostgresV14, so all 24 legacy views remain available on PG16 and the +2 new views (gated at V16) bring the PG16 total to 26; sub-16 totals correctly stay flat. New guard tests TestNew_StatIOView / TestNew_StatIOTimeView pin all stable map fields per the replslots/bgwriter precedent. All view tests pass.

New views set UniqueKey: 0 explicitly while replslots relies on the zero default. This is an intentional, documented deviation (task hint + Decision 2): the explicit 0 signals the synthetic io_key column rather than an unset field. Harmless and improves readability; not a consistency defect.

The diff also reformats the Configure() doc-comment (gofmt list-indentation change from leading-space to tab/0xa0 form). This is an incidental gofmt normalization, not a functional change, and does not alter behavior. Within acceptable scope.
